T-1.description: Write README.md — pitch, quick start, architecture diagram, feature list, comparison table vs other tools

T-2.description: Write install.sh — clone repo, create symlink, add bin/ to PATH, register hooks, verify installation

T-3.description: Write docs/getting-started.md — install, scaffold first harness, launch first agent, verify it works

T-4.description: Write docs/architecture.md — 5-component diagram, data flow, file ownership map

T-5.description: Write docs/event-bus.md — bus_publish API, side-effects, schema.json reference

T-6.description: Write docs/hooks.md — PreToolUse, PostToolUse, Stop pipeline, custom hook authoring

T-7.description: Write CHANGELOG.md from git history — follow Keep a Changelog format

T-8.description: Create examples/minimal-harness/ — single self-manager agent, bounded lifecycle, simple task graph

T-9.description: Create examples/multi-agent/ — coordinator + 2 workers, demonstrates delegation pattern

T-10.description: Set up GitHub Actions CI — run tests/run-all.sh on push, report pass/fail

T-11.description: Draft Show HN post — 'Show HN: claude-ops — autonomous multi-agent orchestration for Claude Code'

T-12.description: Draft r/ClaudeAI post — demo-focused, screenshots/GIFs of agent coordination

T-13.description: Triage GitHub issues weekly (recurring) — label, assign priority, close stale
